Bitcoin reach $75,000 in July: Yes 3% (vol $88,886).

Interpretation: Highest probability is Bitcoin reaching $67,500 in July at 59% (bullish). Lower probabilities for higher targets (72.5k 8%, 75k 3%). Dip probabilities low (4% dip to 57.5k).
